title: A washing device with improved safety
abstract: The present invention relates to a washing machine (1) comprising a body (2); a housing (3) arranged on the body (2); a dispenser (4) wherein the cleaning agents such as the detergent and the softener are loaded, that is movably placed into the housing (3) and that has an open position wherein the dispenser (4) extends outwards from the housing (3) and a closed position wherein the dispenser (4) is almost completely in the housing (3); a distributor (5) that enables water to be supplied into the dispenser (4), and at least one first locking means (6) and at least one second locking means (7) that are positioned respectively on the dispenser (4) and the housing (3) and configured to enable the dispenser (4) to be locked in the closed position by engaging with each other when the dispenser (4) is in the closed position, whereby said first locking means (6) changes form based on the temperature.
claims: Claims ( 9 ) A washing machine (1) comprising a body (2); a housing (3) arranged on the body (2); a dispenser (4) wherein the cleaning agents such as the detergent and the softener are loaded, that is movably placed into the housing (3) and that has an open position wherein the dispenser (4) extends outwards from the housing (3) and a closed position wherein the dispenser (4) is almost completely in the housing (3); a distributor (5) that enables water to be supplied into the dispenser (4), and at least one first locking means (6) and at least one second locking means (7) that are positioned respectively on the dispenser (4) and the housing (3) and configured to enable the dispenser (4) to be locked in the closed position by engaging with each other when the dispenser (4) is in the closed position, characterized by the first locking means (6) -	that changes form based on the temperature, and -	has a free position (A) wherein the first locking means (6) does not contact the second locking means (7) when the dispenser (4) is in the closed position and -	a locked position (B) wherein the first locking means (6) changes form with respect to the free position (A) due to the heat absorbed from the hot water when the hot water is supplied to the dispenser (4) through the distributor (5) and abuts the second locking means (7). A washing machine (1) as in Claim 1, characterized by the first locking means (6) that is provided on the dispenser (4) and the second locking means (7) that is provided on the housing (3). A washing machine (1) as in Claim 1 or Claim 2, characterized by two first locking means (6) each on one side of the dispenser (4) and two second locking means (7) each on one side wall of the housing (3). A washing machine (1) as in any one of the claims 1 to 3, characterized by the first locking means (6) that has the form of an almost straight strip in the free position (A). A washing machine (1) as in Claim 4, characterized by the first locking means (6) that is fixed at one end such that the free end thereof bends towards the second locking means (7) in the locked position (B). A washing machine (1) as in Claim 5, characterized by a support (8) that enables the first locking means (6) to be fixed at the center thereof. A washing machine (1) as in any one of the above claims, characterized by the second locking means (7) that has the form of a recess that receives the first locking means (6) in the locked position (B). A washing machine (1) as in any one of the above claims, characterized by the first locking means (6) that is a bimetal strip. A washing machine (1) as in any one of the above claims, having a control unit (9) that controls the operation thereof, characterized by the control (9) unit that enables the cold water to be supplied after the hot water supply.
